productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Bello Blue Casual Shoes
description: This buckaroo Claro casual shoe is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. This classic take on the sneaker shoe has a touch of man-about-town nonchalance with its sleek styling. Wear this with denims, a tee and a structured blazer, or with corduroy trousers.UpperFull grain leather upper for added durability and style with suede overlaysPerforations along the midfoot for ventilationSix-hole lace upsLightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug FitLeather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryWell-cushioned footbed for all-day comfortBrand logo embossed on lateral side of the heelPull loop at the heel collarMidsoleEVA midsole with shock absorbersOutsoleSlip-resistant TPU outsole with an upraised heel and circular lugs for grip and tractionShoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
